TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-pear_panay

S.FORM: i sawni haw mamelaw i i tiza i nipaazih nu atiwawa a kungku.
S.TRANSL: 剛剛看到的是要給小孩看的故事書。
What (I) had just read was a story for children.

S.FORM: izaw kya cacay a babalaki mikalic i tiza i kilang.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人在那裡爬樹。
An old man was climbing a tree over there.

S.FORM: nikalican niza a kilang u heci siheciay u heci niza u kayabes.
S.TRANSL: 他爬的是果樹，而果實是番石榴。
What he climbed was a fruit tree, which bore guavas.

S.FORM: tabaki isaw kya angangan nya kayabes.
S.TRANSL: 那番石榴樹很大啦。
That guava tree was huge.

S.FORM: E yadah tu ku nialaan niza izaw kya mikitinay tu tu sizi a pahutinay kya sa.
S.TRANSL: 他拿了很多(番石榴)，有人牽著羊。
He took many (guavas), and one man carried a goat.

S.FORM: muculil mitaelib i nu sasa i kilang.
S.TRANSL: 經過樹下。
(A man) walked by the tree.

S.FORM: nipipitpit tu nya taw.
S.TRANSL: 他在摘 (番石榴)。
He was picking (guavas).

S.FORM: sani sa izaw aca ku makabatikalay sa calicali’.
S.TRANSL: 不久又有騎腳踏車的走來走去。
Soon a bicycle rider walked to and fro.

S.FORM: nu mi… mihicaay milisu’ay.
S.TRANSL: 他要做什麼 不知道是不是在巡視。
What was he doing? Was he inspecting?

S.FORM: mimelaw tu nipipitpit niza.
S.TRANSL: 他在看他摘。
The man saw that he was picking.

S.FORM: ta izaw tu kya wawa niza.
S.TRANSL: 有小孩。
There was a child.

S.FORM: mitupin tu hiya u u kayabes i tiza han niza i nu ayawan nu batikal.
S.TRANSL: 在腳踏車前面好像載著番石榴之類的。
He carried something like pomegranate in the front of the bicycle.

S.FORM: muculil ciniza sa malalitemuh tu a tu zuma adiwawa.
S.TRANSL: 他遇到其他小孩。
He ran into other children.

S.FORM: mapulin ciniza talinukut.
S.TRANSL: 他跌倒及踢到(東西)。
He fell and kicked (something).

S.FORM: mahantu kyami kya nitupinan niza a kayabes sa.
S.TRANSL: 他載的番石榴該怎麼辦?
What could he do with his pomegranates which he carried?

S.FORM: iza ku malaklak tu i tiza i sasa.
S.TRANSL: 散落在地上。
They scattered on the ground.

S.FORM: ta mabilil ciniza misapud tya kayabes.
S.TRANSL: 他趕緊撿番石榴。
He picked up the guavas in a hurry.

S.FORM: izaw kya masabuluday a adiwawa mabalabalakasay i tini i zazan sa.
S.TRANSL: 有一群小孩在路上玩。
A group of children were playing on a road.

S.FORM: padang han nya katuuday a adiwawa.
S.TRANSL: 大家都幫他。
Everyone helped him.

S.FORM: na saan sa mu… mumul tu ciniza masupelid niza ku tupelu.
S.TRANSL: 他走了而且忘了帽子。
He left and forgot his hat.

S.FORM: ta sani mumul tu amin kya adiwawa mu mutaluma.
S.TRANSL: 不久那些孩子全都回家了。
Soon, all the children went home.

S.FORM: sa mikapet tu babalakasan nu heni u u sapad nipa nipasiketan tu u kumu a a mali.
S.TRANSL: 他們握著綁著橡皮球的玩具。
They hold their toys with a rubber ball on them.

S.FORM: tekateka sa a muculil.
S.TRANSL: 一邊走一邊發出XXX的聲音。
They made click sound while walking.

S.FORM: kapahay a babalakasen nu babalakasan nu adiwawa.
S.TRANSL: 那是孩子們好玩的玩具。
That was a good toy for children.
